The '''Retreat at Katraasii''' was a battle during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] that took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Katraasii]]. [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Jai'galaar (clone)|Jai'galaar]] embarrassed himself during the retreat from Katraasii, and was demoted to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] for his actions. Luckily for Jag, he was picked up by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], who drafted Captain Jag as a test [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the new [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]].<ref name="Insider" />
